style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: 在人海里 我透明得像一场空气 / [鼓点加速] 直到代码 划破了沉闷的死寂

atmosphere.overall_mood: 地铁站中的透明感与觉醒爆发，从压抑到空间碎裂——这是全MV最关键的转场段
atmosphere.lighting: 荧光灯冷白光→碎裂后金色光芒涌入

video_prompt: A semi-transparent glitching figure standing still in crowded subway with motion-blurred commuters, then reality shatters like glass with golden code lightning, dramatic A-to-B style transition, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 鼓点开始加速，从轻柔主歌过渡到桥段，在碎裂瞬间鼓点重击
bgm.instruments: 渐强鼓组、失真吉他前奏、电子脉冲

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 地铁站台全景，拥挤的人群快速穿梭，主角孤独地站在人流中央
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 人群如洪流，主角如孤岛
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Wide shot of a crowded subway station platform, a lone young man standing still in the center while motion-blurred commuters rush past on both sides, harsh fluorescent overhead lighting, cold sterile white-grey tones, isolation in the crowd, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角身体边缘开始出现半透明的像素化故障(Glitch)特效，人群从他身体穿过
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 存在感消失——人群直接穿透他
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A young man becoming semi-transparent with pixelated glitch effects at his body edges, commuters seemingly passing through him, digital distortion artifacts, subway station with fluorescent lights, cold grey tones with subtle digital color bleeding, existential invisibility, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 环绕镜头——主角完全静止且半透明，周围人流如延时摄影快速流动

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 完全静止，身体高度透明

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 时间加速，唯独他被遗忘在时间之外
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Arc shot orbiting around a nearly transparent ghostly figure standing completely still, surrounded by time-lapse motion-blurred crowds rushing in all directions, the figure fading like a ghost, subway station environment, cold grey tones, loneliness and invisibility, cinematic, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: [鼓点加速] 主角指尖突然迸发出一丝金色电弧，时间开始减速

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 手指微微颤动，金色电弧从指尖闪出

transition.description: 金色元素突然出现在灰色世界

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 觉醒的第一道信号——指尖的金色闪电
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up of fingertips crackling with golden electrical arcs in a grey subway station, time slowing down, the first spark of digital awakening, contrast of golden energy against cold grey environment, dramatic, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 空间突然静止！所有人和物体冻结在半空中，唯独主角恢复实体

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 身体恢复实体，环顾四周

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 时间冰冻——一切戛然而止
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Bullet time freeze frame in a subway station, all commuters frozen mid-step suspended in space, only the protagonist fully solid and aware, looking around in shock, frozen water droplets and paper scraps hanging in air, cold grey tones, dramatic moment of awakening, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金色代码如闪电从主角指尖迸发，划破空间

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 举起双手，金色代码洪流从指尖喷涌而出

transition.description: 代码闪电开始击碎空间

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 沉默被打破——代码即力量
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A young man raising his hands as golden code lightning bolts erupt from his fingertips, the golden streams cutting through the frozen grey subway space like lightning, dramatic upward angle, golden code energy contrasting against cold grey frozen world, power awakening, cinematic, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 空间开始碎裂——地铁站的瓷砖墙、天花板出现金色裂纹
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A subway station cracking and shattering like glass, golden cracks spreading across white tiled walls and ceiling, the protagonist standing at the epicenter, grey reality fragments beginning to fall away revealing golden light underneath, zoom out revealing the scale of destruction, dramatic, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 大块灰色现实碎片剥落坠下，露出底层璀璨的金色数字世界

transition.description: A世界碎片剥落→B世界显现

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 旧世界的灰色外壳剥落，金色光芒涌入
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 碎裂声+数字世界的宏大回响
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Large chunks of grey reality falling away like broken glass, revealing a brilliant golden digital world underneath, the protagonist with arms spread wide embracing the transformation, grey fragments falling while golden code and neon blue light floods in from behind, epic moment of worlds colliding, dramatic contrast, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 最后一块灰色碎片坠落，画面完全切入金色的数字奇迹世界

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 在金色虚空中自由漂浮

transition.description: 从A完全切换到B——数字世界展开

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 奇迹世界完全展开——华丽、宏大、失重
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 宏大的合成器和弦铺开
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A figure floating freely in a vast golden digital void, the last grey fragments of reality dissolving below, surrounded by streams of golden code and neon blue data flows, epic cyber-mythology space fully revealed, weightless majestic atmosphere, golden and deep space blue palette, awe-inspiring, 16:9 aspect ratio
